items.subject: New OpenAI Academy courses for the next era of work
items.body: OpenAI introduces three Academy courses that help people build practical AI skills, create repeatable workflows, and apply agents in everyday work.

items.subject: How Preply combines AI and human tutors to personalize learning
items.body: Preply uses OpenAI to launch AI-generated lesson summaries, providing personalised feedback and language learning exercises.

items.subject: OpenAI to acquire Ona
items.body: OpenAI plans to acquire Ona to expand Codex with secure, persistent cloud environments, enabling long-running AI agents across enterprise workflows.

items.subject: BBVA puts AI at the core of banking with OpenAI
items.body: Learn how BBVA scaled ChatGPT Enterprise to 100,000 employees and partnered with OpenAI to accelerate AI-powered banking transformation worldwide.

items.subject: Supporting Europe’s work in ensuring a trustworthy AI ecosystem
items.body: OpenAI supports the EU Code of Practice on AI content transparency, advancing provenance standards and tools to help people understand AI-generated content.

items.subject: How an astrophysicist uses Codex to help simulate black holes
items.body: Discover how astrophysicist Chi-kwan Chan uses Codex to build black hole simulations, helping scientists study extreme physics and test Einstein’s theory of general relativity.

items.subject: PRC-linked influence operations are targeting AI debates in the US
items.body: A new report from OpenAI details PRC-linked influence operations using AI to target U. S. tech debates, data center narratives, tariffs, and false claims about ChatGPT.

items.subject: What Codex unlocks for Notion
items.body: How Notion uses Codex to one-shot specs, build AI Voice Input for the web, and multiply engineering power across small teams.

items.subject: How engineers at Nextdoor use Codex to build without limits
items.body: How engineers at Nextdoor use Codex with GPT-5.5 to investigate hard-to-reproduce issues, build across platforms, and focus on product outcomes.

items.subject: Introducing the OpenAI Economic Research Exchange
items.body: OpenAI launches the Economic Research Exchange to study AI’s impact on jobs, productivity, and the economy. Applications are now open for selected research projects.

items.subject: Built to benefit everyone: our plan
items.body: A vision for the future of AI, focusing on access, safety, and shared prosperity as OpenAI works to ensure AGI benefits everyone.

items.subject: Confidential submission of draft S-1 to the SEC
items.body: OpenAI confirms a confidential S-1 submission to the SEC and has not yet determined timing for further action.

summary:
**Summary of Key Developments:**

* **OpenAI Expands its Offering:** OpenAI introduced three new Academy courses that focus on building practical AI skills, creating repeatable workflows, and applying AI agents in everyday work.
* **Partnerships and Collaborations:** OpenAI has been actively collaborating with various companies, including NVIDIA, BBVA, and Nextdoor, to integrate AI into their products and services.
* **AI Acquisition and Growth:** OpenAI has acquired Ona to expand Codex with secure, persistent cloud environments and has been actively growing its product portfolio through partnerships and acquisitions.
* **AI Research and Innovation:** OpenAI has been conducting research on various aspects of AI, including AI's impact on jobs, productivity, and the economy, and is releasing research on topics such as AGI and AI-generated content.
* **NVIDIA's AI Advancements:** NVIDIA has been pushing the boundaries of AI research and innovation, releasing new AI models and partnering with companies like Google and Apple to accelerate AI adoption.

**Key Trend:** As AI becomes increasingly pervasive in various industries, AI companies are competing to create innovative products and services. The current trend highlights a focus on scalability, security, and collaboration as AI companies strive to deliver robust and trustworthy AI solutions. Companies like OpenAI and NVIDIA are taking the lead in shaping the future of AI and setting the standard for AI innovation.

**Additional Insights:**

* AI adoption is becoming more widespread across industries, with companies focusing on integrating AI into their products and services.
* AI research and innovation are key drivers of growth and competitiveness in the AI industry.
* AI companies are prioritizing scalability, security, and collaboration to deliver robust and trustworthy AI solutions.
